tasks.subject: Task 0: Pre-flight audit + Phase 1 migration module
tasks.description: Idempotent user_version-gated migration: dispatched_at/criterion_index/loop_iteration/triage columns + critical_loop table. Files: migrations.py (new), db.py (mod), test_migrations.py. Verify: pytest tests/test_migrations.py -q.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Register CriticalLoop entity in nodes.py
tasks.description: Add CriticalLoop to ENTITY_TABLES + EXTRA_REQUIRED(finding_id,started_at) + EXTRA_OPTIONAL(iteration_count,diagnostic_fired_at,resolved_at). Files: nodes.py (mod), test_critical_loop.py. Verify: pytest tests/test_critical_loop.py -q.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Critical-loop lifecycle module
tasks.description: loops.py: start/advance/resolve/get_open_loops; diagnostic_fired_at set once at iteration 3. Files: loops.py (new), test_critical_loop.py (append). Verify: pytest tests/test_critical_loop.py -q.

tasks.subject: Task 3: dispatched_at + dispatch_spec + criteria immutability
tasks.description: dispatch.py stamps dispatched_at once; validators.validate_dispatched_immutable rejects post-dispatch criteria change w/ supersede message. Files: dispatch.py (new), validators.py (mod), test_dispatch_immutability.py. Verify: pytest tests/test_dispatch_immutability.py -q.
